message:
feat(bubbles): Add Model trait implementations for Timer and List components

- Timer: Implement Model trait with init/update/view methods for standalone
  bubbletea usage. Timer.init() returns a tick command to start the countdown.

- List: Implement Model trait with init/update/view methods. List.init() returns
  None since lists are typically initialized with items already.

- Add comprehensive unit tests for both Model trait implementations:
  - Test trait methods work correctly via explicit trait calls
  - Test components satisfy Model + Send + 'static bounds
  - Test message handling through trait update method

This enables Timer and List components to be used directly as standalone
models in bubbletea applications, completing 2 of the 11 remaining Model
trait implementations needed for the bubbles crate.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
